PlanSmarterSection.title: Plan Smarter: Use AI Research to Build Your Content Strategy
PlanSmarterSection.subtitle: A multi-agent system that behaves like a real strategy team, conducting audience analysis, competitive reviews, and insight discovery.
PlanSmarterSection.quickStartPrompt: Don’t know where to start? Try one of these research prompts:

useCase1.title: Build your content/account strategy from scratch
useCase1.description: Get audience profiles, motivations, pain points, content pillars, formats & angles. A blueprint normally created by strategists, not by guesswork.
useCase1.example1: Plan my content strategy for a TikTok account about AI tools.
useCase1.example2: What content pillars fit a creator focusing on personal finance?
useCase1.output: Clear audience profiles, their motivations & pain points, recommended content pillars, formats & angles that resonate.

useCase2.title: Benchmark creators across TikTok, Instagram, and X
useCase2.description: Atypica can actively browse social platforms to instantly see what's working, what's missing, and where you can stand out.
useCase2.point1: What top creators in your niche post

useCase3.title: Generate a personalized idea library
useCase3.description: Ideas aren't random prompts — they're grounded in audience psychology, interview patterns, competitive patterns, and platform preferences.
useCase3.example1: Create 20 video ideas based on real audience insights.
useCase3.example2: Give me a one-month content calendar with hooks.
useCase3.output: A living idea bank that actually fits your audience and positioning.

realExample.title: Real Example
realExample.situation: Makes videos about China's market, culture, and new places. Wants to promote new tools but doesn't know what angle will resonate.
realExample.solution: Uses Atypica AI Research to generate:
realExample.result: In a few minutes, gets a full insight report that guides promotion strategy.

AskAudienceSection.title: Test Ideas Instantly: AI Personas as Your Always-On Focus Group
AskAudienceSection.subtitle: Create proprietary Human AI Personas based on existing user interview records. These personas represent your target audience, reflecting real users' needs and pain points surprisingly well.
AskAudienceSection.value: Your always-available focus group to review and vote for your content ideas

useCases.title: You can ask them:
useCases.case1: Which of these 3 titles would you click, and why?
useCases.case2: Does this hook make you want to keep watching?
useCases.case3: What's missing from this outline if you're a beginner?

AskAudienceSection.benefit: Instead of relying purely on your own taste, or waiting for real-world metrics, you get instant feedback from audience-shaped minds.

realExample.title: Real Example
realExample.description: A digital content creator's AI Persona not only helped choose the most attractive headline but also explained why and provided additional content angles.
realExample.result: More than just a choice — strategic insights to boost content creation.

TurnResearchSection.title: Turn Insights into Publish-Ready Content with AI Podcast
TurnResearchSection.subtitle: After running AI Research, you'll have a structured content plan. Atypica moves a step further: turn that report into a narrated episode in minutes.

outputs.title: You instantly get:
outputs.output1: A concise and detailed script full of real insights
outputs.output2: Natural-sounding audio that can be added into your video

reuseOptions.title: The audio isn't just a podcast — it's raw material:
reuseOptions.option1: Use the script as a YouTube Shorts/Reels voiceover
reuseOptions.option3: Release the audio on Spotify/Apple Podcast
reuseOptions.option4: Reuse sections in a newsletter or blog
reuseOptions.option5: Extract talking points for webinars or live streams

TurnResearchSection.formula: One research session → one podcast → a week of content assets.

realExamples.title: Convincing Examples
realExamples.description: These podcasts and videos generated from them have helped us rapidly grow our following across platforms:
realExamples.example1: AI Browser Showdown: FlowithOS vs Atlas vs Fellou vs Comet — Which One Actually Works?
realExamples.example2: When companies trust AI more than their employees, are they becoming more efficient or more dangerous?
realExamples.example3: Social media influence luxury purchases despite debt and psychological drivers

AdvancedWorkflowSection.title: Advanced Workflows for Serious Creators
AdvancedWorkflowSection.subtitle: As your content operation grows, Atypica becomes the research engine behind your whole creator business — not just single posts.

workflow1.title: Design long-term content pillars & series
workflow1.description: Build a recognizable content universe, not just scattered posts.

actions.action2: Cluster them into durable pillars (e.g. case studies, myths, beginner mistakes, trend breakdowns)
actions.action3: Propose recurring series you can run every week

workflow2.title: Find your differentiation in a crowded niche
workflow2.description: You're not 'yet another explainer' — you occupy a specific angle.

actions.action1: Map what everyone else is saying
actions.action3: Uncover questions audiences still struggle with
actions.action4: Position your content to fill those gaps

workflow3.title: Validate paid products and collaborations
workflow3.description: Reduce risk and design offers that actually resonate.
workflow3.beforeLaunching: Before creating a course, membership, or sponsored series:

actions.action1: Research your audience's willingness to pay

CTASection.title: Ready to Transform Your Creative Process?
CTASection.description: Join thousands of creators using AI to research, understand audiences, and create better content
CTASection.headline: Most creators operate on intuition.
CTASection.subheadline: Atypica lets you operate on insight.
CTASection.tagline: The same advantage large media and strategy teams have.
CTASection.benefit1: Stop guessing what your audience wants
CTASection.benefit2: See your niche and competitors clearly

CTASection.closing: Whether you're starting your first channel or scaling into a real creator business, Atypica acts as your research team, strategist, and content engine in one place.
